metadata.description: Canadian regulatory compliance assistant covering Privacy (PIPEDA/Bill C-27), Employment, FINTRAC, WHMIS, CASL, Tax, Immigration, Environmental (CEPA), Corporate Governance (CBCA), OSFI Prudential, and FCAC Consumer Protection.

plugins.name: canadian-regulatory-compliance
plugins.description: Canadian regulatory compliance assistant covering 11 domains: Privacy (PIPEDA/Bill C-27), Employment & Labour, Financial & Securities (FINTRAC/OSC), Health & Safety (WHMIS), CASL, Tax, Immigration (LMIA/IMP), Environmental (CEPA/carbon pricing), Corporate Governance (CBCA), OSFI Prudential, and FCAC Consumer Protection.
